REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2026-2028 Lawton Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $790,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond is not required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions Re: Payment Of Claim
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Crow appeared by telephone for JDS Professional Group (CPA). Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner). Bryan Chase from JDS also appeared by telephone.

All Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to JDS' fees, the extent of services provided and where the invoices where being sent. Mr. Der stated that the Trust's interest in the Condo was sold to Ms. Andre, that she made one payment, that she missed two payments and that she has been paying consistantly. In addition, Mr. Der stated that a Deed of Trust was recorded in Colorado. Mr. Der also provided Trust history. The Petition for Instructions Re: Payment of Claim was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status On The Transfer Of The Assets And For Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Continued To Jan-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that he received an e-mail from Ms. Andre requesting 6 additional weeks, that he asked her to send a letter to the Court explaining the need for the continuance and that he forwarded the Examiner's notes to her. The matter was continued to January 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A further Order to Show Cause will be issued to Susan Andre for failure to appear, for failure to account and to show cause as to why sanctions should not be increased to $50.00 per day. The return date is January 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. Sanctions will be increased to $50.00.00 per day if no appearance is made. The Court will examine options as to how to move this matter forward.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status On The Transfer Of The Assets And For Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Continued To Sep-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that he got a bookkeeping fee arangement for the Accountant to prepare the accounting for the Attorney in Colorado, that Ms. Andre was not responding and he had not seen the accounting. Mr. Der will prepare an Order Re: Contempt. Sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be charged against Susan Andre and will begin accruing on September 22, 2009. The matter was continued to September 29, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status On The Transfer Of The Assets And For Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-05-2009 Continued To Sep-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that the Former Trustee stepped down, that they collected some of the assets, that the issue was whether to compel the accounting, that no arrangements had been made and that he had not seen an accounting. The Court will issue an Order To Show Cause to the Former Trustee, Susan Andre to appear and show cause why she/he should not be held in contempt for failure to file the accounting. The return date is September 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status On The Transfer Of The Assets And For Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Continued To Aug-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, For Order Compelling Accounting And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for Elizabeth Twomey. Ernset Der for Debra Dolch.

Judge Ballati informed Mr. Der that he was an acquaintance of Mr. Shustoff. Mr. Der had no objection to Judge Ballati hearing the matter. The Court stated that a complete accounting for the period of November 11, 2000 to the date that all of the assets were turned over to Debra Dolch was to be delivered by May 27, 2009. Mr. Der stated that Ms. Andres told him that she was going to turn over all of the assets. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The matter was set for May 27, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the transfer of assets and for status on filing of the accounting.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
